description:
You are an 8th-grade student at an OLPC school working on a 'Virtual Model UN' project. Calculate the total cost of a multi-country field trip using data from '/home/ga/Documents/rates.json' (USD base exchange rates) and '/home/ga/Documents/field_trip_expenses.csv' (Date, Item, Category, Amount, Currency). Create a Python script at '/home/ga/Documents/trip_calculator.py' that converts all expenses to USD, calculates the total trip cost, and aggregates costs by category (Transport, Accommodation, Food, Activities). The script must generate a report at '/home/ga/Documents/trip_financial_summary.txt' with values rounded to 2 decimal places, following this exact format:

=== FIELD TRIP FINANCIAL SUMMARY ===
Total Trip Cost: $[X.XX]

--- Cost By Category ---
Transport: $[A.AA]
Accommodation: $[B.BB]
Food: $[C.CC]
Activities: $[D.DD]
